CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "NAP - Chemagen Products") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "NAP - Chemagen Products") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "NAP - Chemagen Products"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "NAP")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-NAP
